prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约291→308→305→488→373名，2024年出现明显后移（488名），2025年回升至373名，近两年波动较大；2025年基准约373名；本省物理类计划2021–2025年分别为27→27→28→28→30人，呈小幅递增；2026年计划37人，较2025年扩招约23.3%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争格局有重要影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第5名，近年排名稳定在前5，属全国顶尖高校层次；2026年声誉评价偏负面（师德师风相关事件），但抖音热度 排名第4（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，整体报考关注度仍处高位；历史投档异常信号未见明显断档记录；复旦大学A-及以上学科超过20个，涵盖中国史A+、 中国语言文学A+、哲学A+、政治学A+、数学A+、新闻传播学A+、物理学A+、生物学A+、理论经济学A+、马克思主义理论A+等，与物理类招生专业（数学类、物理学类、计算机类、 工科试验班等）高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等物理类相关专业2026年均为高热推荐；本省2026年物理类考生约25.14万人（较2025年 24.98万人微增0.6%），竞争基数略有扩大；省控线2025年本科批426分，较2024年437分下降，卷面难度可能略降；复旦大学位于上海，属一线城市，对湖北考 生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在湖北招生占比约0.5%–0.8%，属正常水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准373名、2026年大幅扩招23.3%、考生微增0.6%、声誉偏 负面但抖音高热、相关专业热度推荐等多因素；考虑扩招可能吸引更多高分考生报考，实际竞争略加剧。预测最低位次约417名，区间367–467名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 291 → 308 → 305 → 488 → 373. In 2024, there was a noticeable backward shift (488th), and in 2025 it rebounded to 373rd, showing significant fluctuations in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 373rd. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 27 → 27 → 28 → 28 → 30, showing a slight increase. The 2026 plan is 37, an expansion of about 23.3% compared to 2025, which is significant and will have an important impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 5th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable among the top 5 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative (related to teacher ethics incidents), but Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, maintaining high overall application attention. No obvious record of historical admission anomalies. Fudan University has over 20 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, Political Science, Mathematics, Journalism and Communication, Physics, Biology, Theoretical Economics, Marxist Theory, etc., highly matching the Physics Category enrollment majors (Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science, Engineering Experimental Class, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other Physics Category related majors are all highly recommended for 2026. The number of Physics Category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 251,400 (a slight increase of 0.6% from 249,800 in 2025), with a slightly expanded competition base. The provincial control line for 2025 undergraduate batch is 426 points, down from 437 points in 2024, indicating a possible slight decrease in exam difficulty. Fudan University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Hubei examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Hubei is about 0.5%–0.8%, which is normal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors: the 2025 baseline of 373rd, a significant 23.3% expansion in 2026, a 0.6% increase in examinees, slightly negative reputation but high Douyin popularity, and recommended related majors. Considering that the expansion may attract more high-scoring examinees, actual competition slightly intensifies. The predicted minimum ranking is about 417th, with a range of 367–467.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (≤367), you can focus on reaching for top Tier 1 flagship majors.
